summary: Lightweight 2AI orchestrator stabilization: input guards, scope enforcement, completion standardization, failure/retry normalization, and API usage recording
achievements: Test mock foundation hardened with shared conftest.py fixtures (session-81a)
Input guard: session.json/acceptance.yaml preflight validation before API calls (session-81)
allowed_changes_detail enforcement with wildcard path matching (session-82)
Completion decision mechanized via evaluate_completion_decision() — no prose-only judgments (session-83)
failure_type enum fixed via VALID_FAILURE_TYPES frozenset + priority normalization (session-84)
API usage extraction and report.json recording for OpenAI and Claude (session-86)

git_history.first_commit: c97eb98 fix acceptance_ref path resolution for docs-prefixed session refs
git_history.last_commit: 5d554bf merge session-86: api usage and cost recording

phase2_design_principles.before: Executable but quality varies, retry inefficient, AI cost unknown
phase2_design_principles.after: Input guarded, scope enforced, completion mechanized, retry structured, usage visible

risks: evaluate_completion_decision is defined but not yet wired into main() flow — integration is a Phase3 candidate
extract_api_usage depends on provider responses containing 'usage' key — untested with real API responses
validate_allowed_changes_detail_enforcement uses colon-split parsing ('path: description') which may break on paths containing colons
session-81a retry pattern (initial patch failure + retry recovery) persists — Claude patch quality for run_session.py modifications remains unreliable via orchestrator
open_issues: provider file is claude_client.py (not anthropic_client.py) — session-86 definition should be corrected for accuracy
patch_status='ready_for_application' and 'complete' are not yet in _PATCH_STATUS_ALIASES (only 'ready' was added)
session-83 evaluate_completion_decision needs main() integration to actually gate report completion_status
deferred_to_phase3: Claude output verification by GPT (session-89 equivalent)
Context compression and diff-based token optimization (session-90 equivalent)
Multi-AI provider abstraction for Gemini etc. (session-91 equivalent)
evaluate_completion_decision integration into main() execution flow

final_judgement.reason: All 7 sessions passed 4-command verification, 256 tests green, scope violations zero, and remaining issues are improvements not blockers.
